name: User Dashboard
description: Authenticated user area with content management, API key management, account settings, and activity overview.

page_briefs.dashboard: User home dashboard. KPI cards at top showing published items, downloads, and reputation score. Reputation badge display below. Activity feed at the bottom with recent actions.
page_briefs.dashboard-content: Content management grid. Card grid of user-published content items with thumbnail, title, type badge, status indicator, and date per card.
page_briefs.dashboard-api-keys: API key management page. Table of API keys with key name, masked prefix, creation date, last-used date, and revoke button per row. Create-key button in the header.
page_briefs.dashboard-settings: Account settings form with profile fields (name, email, avatar), notification preferences, and connected accounts section.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
